subject: [N5] 35 action items from 2025-10-09 external-alex-wisdom-partners-coaching
body:
Hi V,

I extracted 35 action items from your 2025-10-09 external-alex-wisdom-partners-coaching meeting (20251028-132902_Meetings).
Please review and reply with your approval:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 meeting
   📝 From meeting recap...

**4. **
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**5. ## Key Decisions and Agreements**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**6. **Vrijen to implement emotional benchmarking system** - Alex recommended creating a baseline measurement of Vrijen's current post-retreat mental state to detect future burnout earlier. Matters because burnout descent is gradual ("frog in boiling water") and hard to notice without reference points.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**7. **Focus GTM strategy on hiring managers, not just founders** - Reconfirmed strategic direction to differentiate approach by stakeholder type (founders vs. early talent vs. hiring managers). Matters because hiring managers have different pain points and decision criteria than founders.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**8. **Explore "unsexy company" tech talent placement niche** - Discussion surfaced potential differentiation by targeting non-tech companies (like Coca-Cola) seeking tech talent who are "bottom of pile" for candidates. Matters because this could be less crowded market with stronger value prop.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**9. **Test "baseball cards" / candidate package gimmick** - Agreed to explore creating physical deck of 52 top candidates as awareness-raising stunt and sales tool. Matters because it creates tangible way to demonstrate talent pool quality and community strength.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**10. **Implement FOMO mechanics for hiring manager engagement** - Inspired by StubHub, show hiring managers "recently placed" candidates to create urgency and validate subscription model. Matters because creates logical reason for ongoing subscription vs. one-time placement fee.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**11. ## Strategic Context**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**12. Vrijen returned from week-long wellness retreat in Arizona following burnout period characterized by worst-ever productivity despite maximum concern about productivity. He's implementing "task bankruptcy" concept - acknowledging some follow-ups won't happen and moving forward with clean slate. This emotional reset is critical timing for strategic planning.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Product | 🏷 follow_up
   📝 From meeting recap...

**13. Current business position: Future of Higher Education group committed to pilot (couple hundred users), pursuing HBS and Zooglers communities. Pain point is insufficient traction with companies/startups on hiring side. Alex positioned conversation around surfacing right information to hiring managers to help them "see candidate in the role" - the crucial visualization moment that drives hiring decisions beyond resume screening.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**14. Competitive landscape discussion revealed automation tools (Zapier, N8N) largely fail despite popularity - "conspiracy theory that no automations work, everyone just pretending." Vrijen positioning Zo (the AI tool he uses) as alternative with natural language workflows vs. diagrammatic approach.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**15. Key tension emerging: Should Careerspan focus on (A) founders/Series A and below with loose/opaque decision-making, (B) HR at larger companies with established budgets, or (C) non-tech companies seeking tech talent? Each requires different go-to-market motion.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**16. ## Critical Next Action**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**17. Owner**: Vrijen**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**18. Deliverable**: Discussion with Logan about "52 candidate deck" stunt feasibility and potential awareness impact**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**19. Timeline**: Today (referenced in transcript: "I'm going to talk to Logan today about this stunt idea")**
   📅 Today 5:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🔴 High
   📁 Operations | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**20. Purpose**: Validate whether physical candidate cards can serve dual purpose of (1) demonstrating talent pool quality to companies and (2) raising brand awareness in founder/HR community. Need to assess production logistics, candidate selection criteria, and distribution strategy.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 none
   📝 From meeting recap...

**21. I'm implementing your benchmarking advice—creating a baseline of how I'm feeling now so I can catch burnout earlier next time (instead of the slow boil)**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**22. Planning to discuss the "52 candidate deck" stunt idea with Logan today—thinking it could be a great awareness tool to demonstrate our talent pool quality**
   📅 Today 5:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🔴 High
   📁 Personnel | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**23. Exploring the "hidden gem" positioning you mentioned vs. competing for all-stars. That buyer lens was super helpful**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**24. Three GTM paths to validate over next few weeks: founders (Series A and below), HR at larger companies, or non-tech companies seeking tech talent**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Operations | 🏷 deliverable
   📝 Deliverable from meeting...

**25. **Warm intro to Aly Owens** - I'll send you a blurb this week to help facilitate the connection to the PM community founder. Really appreciate you checking your Ukrainian tech network for overlaps there.**

   📁 Networking | 🏷 deliverable

**26. **Wisdom Partners referral opportunity** - Once you drop that advisor list in chat, I'll get it out to the Future of CareerTech group and my NYC founder network. Also wanted to mention: Logan and I are organizing a reverse hiring event with Corridor X (20-25 founders, pre-matched with engineers on Careerspan). Could be a target-rich environment for Wisdom Partners if you're interested in sponsoring or just connecting Josh with the opportunity.**
   📅 Wednesday 2:00pm | ⏱ 30m | 🟡 Normal
   📁 Networking | 🏷 deliverable
